rationale: Section 48.253 addresses state aid for tax increment financing payments under Tax Code §311.013(n) and does not reference the homestead exemption in §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 48.253. ADDITIONAL STATE AID FOR TAX INCREMENT FINANCING PAYMENTS. (a) For each school year, a school district is entitled to state aid in an amount equal to the amount the district is required to pay into the tax increment fund for a reinvestment zone under Section 311.013(n), Tax Code.
_note: No textual link between §48.253 and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption. Indirect revenue effects on school districts may exist but are not a direct statutory conflict.
